menu:
<propertyTester
id="org.jkiss.dbeaver.core.projectNavigator" name="%editor.entity.name"
class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.actions.GlobalUIPropertyTester"
icon="platform:/plugin/org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui/icons/database_navigator.svg"
category="org.jkiss.dbeaver.core.category"
<context
allowMultiple="true"
group="%confirm.object.editor.group.name"/>
allowMultiple="false"
id="close_editor_edit" %themeElementCategory.org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.navigator.description
%colorDefinition.org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.navigator.node.modified.foreground.description
id="org.jkiss.dbeaver.core.wizard.new.project"
properties="canOpen,canDelete,canCreateFile,canCreateFolder,canCreateLink,canSetActive,isLocalFS,isFolder,type"
id="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.navigator.node.statistics.background"
class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.navigator.database.DatabaseBrowserView"
type="org.jkiss.dbeaver.model.DBPNamedObject"/>
icon="platform:/plugin/org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui/icons/properties.svg"
namespace="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.editors.entity"
categoryId="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.navigator"
<propertyTester
class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.tools.project.ProjectCreateWizard"
label="%colorDefinition.org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.navigator.node.transient.foreground.label" id="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.navigator.node.new.background"
class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.editors.entity.EntityEditor"
description="%context.org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.context.navigator.description"/>
id="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.navigator.node.foreground"
id="entity_revert"
id="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.actions.ObjectPropertyTester"
<confirmation
categoryId="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.navigator"
label="%colorDefinition.org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.navigator.node.modified.background.label"
class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.navigator.database.DatabaseNavigatorView"
value="240, 240, 240">
class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.navigator.project.ProjectNavigatorView"
<propertyTester
description="%confirm.entity_revert.tip" name="%context.org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.context.navigator.name"
properties="childOfType,isTableContainer"
categoryId="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.navigator"
contributorClass="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.editors.entity.FolderEditorContributor"
%view.database.navigator.description
%colorDefinition.org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.navigator.node.new.background.description
name="%view.project.explorer.title">
allowMultiple="false"
class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.editors.entity.EntityEditorPropertyTester"
title="%confirm.entity_revert.title"
<propertyTester namespace="org.jkiss.dbeaver.model"
<colorDefinition
id="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.editors.entity.EntityEditor">
parentId="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.context.navigator"
title="%confirm.close_editor_edit.title" id="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.editors.entity.FolderEditorPropertyTester" <colorDefinition
<propertyTester label="%colorDefinition.org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.navigator.node.foreground.label" toggleMessage="%confirm.entity.toggleMessage"
<confirmation
id="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.context.navigator"
-->
namespace="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.editors.folder"
description="%confirm.entity_reject.tip"
properties="canOpen,canCreateSingle,canCreateMulti,canPaste,canDelete,canRename,canMoveUp,canMoveDown,canFilter,canFilterObject,hasFilter,supportsIndexCreate,supportsConstraintCreate,supportsNativeExecution,projectResourceEditable,projectResourceViewable"
<editor <colorDefinition
class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.navigator.project.ProjectExplorerView"
category="org.jkiss.dbeaver.core.category"
type="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui.editors.entity.FolderEditor"/>
<commandParameter
category="org.jkiss.dbeaver.core.category"
type="org.eclipse.core.resources.IResource"/>
id="entity_reject"
<handler commandId="org.jkiss.dbeaver.core.project.active"
properties="hasPermission,canCreateConnection,canCreateProject,hasActiveProject,hasMultipleProjects,canEditResource,currentProjectResourceEditable,currentProjectResourceViewable"
